TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: The MD5 function calculates the checksum of 50 input values using a cryptographic Message-Digest algorithm 5 and returns a 32 character string of hexadecimal digits (0 - F).
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: exp_HASH50_MD5_ID

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: MD5(in_FIELD1 || '|' || in_FIELD2 || '|' || in_FIELD3 || '|' || in_FIELD4 || '|' || in_FIELD5 || '|' || in_FIELD6 || '|' || in_FIELD7 || '|' || in_FIELD8 || '|' || in_FIELD9 || '|' || in_FIELD10 || '|' || in_FIELD11 || '|' || in_FIELD12 || '|' || in_FIELD13 || '|' || in_FIELD14 || '|' || in_FIELD15 || '|' || in_FIELD16 || '|' || in_FIELD17 || '|' || in_FIELD18 || '|' || in_FIELD19 || '|' || in_FIELD20 || '|' || in_FIELD21 || '|' || in_FIELD22 || '|' || in_FIELD23 || '|' || in_FIELD24 || '|' || in_FIELD25 || '|' || in_FIELD26 || '|' || in_FIELD27 || '|' || in_FIELD28 || '|' || in_FIELD29 || '|' || in_FIELD30 || '|' || in_FIELD31 || '|' || in_FIELD32 || '|' || in_FIELD33 || '|' || in_FIELD34 || '|' || in_FIELD35 || '|' || in_FIELD36 || '|' || in_FIELD37 || '|' || in_FIELD38 || '|' || in_FIELD39 || '|' || in_FIELD40 || '|' || in_FIELD41 || '|' || in_FIELD42 || '|' || in_FIELD43 || '|' || in_FIELD44 || '|' || in_FIELD45 || '|' || in_FIELD46 || '|' || in_FIELD47 || '|' || in_FIELD48 || '|' || in_FIELD49 || '|' || in_FIELD50)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: v_MD5_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Source Filter
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
--EDW_UPDATE_TMS > DATEADD(DD,-1, GETDATE())
EQPMNT_AAR_BASE.EQPMNT_ID in ( SELECT MAX(EQPMNT_ID) FROM [ATM_EQPMT].[EQPMNT_AAR_BASE] WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE EDW_UPDATE_TMS > DATEADD(DD,-1, GETDATE()) GROUP BY MARK_CD,EQPUN_NBR )

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT MARK_CD AS MARK_CD, EQPUN_NBR AS EQPUN_NBR, CPR_EQPMNT_POOL_ID AS CPR_EQPMT_POOL_ID FROM (SELECT EAB.MARK_CD, EAB.EQPUN_NBR, EPA.EQPMNT_POOL_ASGNMN_ID, MAX (EPA.EQPMNT_POOL_ASGNMN_ID) OVER (PARTITION BY EAB.MARK_CD, EAB.EQPUN_NBR) MAX_EQPMNT_POOL_ASGNMN_ID, EP.AAR_EQPMNT_POOL_ID, EP.CPR_EQPMNT_POOL_ID FROM ATM_EQPMT.EQPMNT_AAR_BASE EAB WITH (NOLOCK), ATM_EQPMT.EQPMNT_POOL_ASGNMN EPA WITH (NOLOCK), ATM_EQPMT.EQPMNT_POOL EP WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE EAB.EQPMNT_ID = EPA.EQPMNT_ID AND EPA.EQPMNT_POOL_ID = EP.EQPMNT_POOL_ID) A WHERE EQPMNT_POOL_ASGNMN_ID = MAX_EQPMNT_POOL_ASGNMN_ID

TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: CAR_OWNERSHIP

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT A.EQPMNT_ID AS EQPMNT_ID, FP.EQPMNT_POOL_ID AS EQPMNT_POOL_ID, F.FLEET_NM AS FLEET_NM, FSC.FLEET_SBGRP_CTGRY_NM AS FLEET_SBGRP_CTGRY_NM, FSC.PARTY_NM AS PARTY_NM, F.FLEET_ID AS FLEET_ID, TEC.TARGET_EQPMT_CTGRY_NM AS TARGET_EQPMT_CTGRY_NM, TP.PRDCT_NM AS PRDCT_NM
FROM (SELECT EQPMNT_ID, EQPMNT_POOL_ID, EQPMNT_POOL_ASGNMN_ID, MAX (EQPMNT_POOL_ASGNMN_ID) OVER (PARTITION BY EQPMNT_ID) MAX_EQPMNT_POOL_ASGNMN_ID FROM ATM_EQPMT.EQPMNT_POOL_ASGNMN) A, ATM_EQPMV.EQPMV_FLEET_POOL FP WITH (NOLOCK), ATM_EQPMV.EQPMV_FLEET_SBGRP FS WITH (NOLOCK), ATM_EQPMV.EQPMV_FLEET_SBGRP_CTGRY FSC WITH (NOLOCK), ATM_EQPMV.EQPMV_FLEET F WITH (NOLOCK), ATM_EQPMV.EQPMV_FLEET_EQPMT_CTGRY FEC WITH (NOLOCK), ATM_EQPMV.EQPMV_TARGET_EQPMT_CTGRY TEC WITH (NOLOCK), ATM_EQPMV.EQPMV_TARGET_PRDCT TP WITH (NOLOCK)
WHERE A.EQPMNT_POOL_ASGNMN_ID = A.MAX_EQPMNT_POOL_ASGNMN_ID AND FP.EQPMNT_POOL_ID = A.EQPMNT_POOL_ID AND FP.FLEET_SBGRP_ID = FS.FLEET_SBGRP_ID AND FS.FLEET_SBGRP_CTGRY_ID = FSC.FLEET_SBGRP_CTGRY_ID AND FP.FLEET_ID = F.FLEET_ID AND F.FLEET_ID = FEC.FLEET_ID AND FEC.TARGET_EQPMT_CTGRY_ID = TEC.TARGET_EQPMT_CTGRY_ID AND TEC.TARGET_PRDCT_ID = TP.TARGET_PRDCT_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT ATM_EQPMT.EQPMNT_MARK_OWNER_CLASS_CD.MARK_OWNER_CTGRY_CD as MARK_OWNER_CTGRY_CD, ATM_EQPMT.EQPMNT_MARK_OWNER_CLASS_CD.MARK_OWNER_CLASS_CD as MARK_OWNER_CLASS_CD FROM ATM_EQPMT.EQPMNT_MARK_OWNER_CLASS_CD WITH (NOLOCK)

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT ENR.RECORD_CREATE_TMS,ENR.MARK_CD, ENR.EQPUN_NBR FROM ATM_EQPMT.EQPMNT_NON_RGSTRD ENR WHERE EDW_UPDATE_TMS > DATEADD(HH,-1, GETDATE()) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 'true' FROM ATM_EQPMT.EQPMNT_AAR_BASE AARB WHERE AARB.MARK_CD = ENR.MARK_CD AND AARB.EQPUN_NBR = ENR.EQPUN_NBR)

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT eqpmnt_id AS EQPMNT_ID,lessee_mark_cd AS LESSEE_MARK_CD FROM (SELECT ep.eqpmnt_id, ep.mark_cd lessee_mark_cd,ep.entity_idntfr_cd, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY EQPMNT_ID ORDER BY RECORD_UPDATE_TMS DESC) RNK FROM atm_eqpmt.eqpmnt_party ep) X WHERE RNK=1 and entity_idntfr_cd = 'LS'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT DM_DIM.DIM_EQUIPMENT.DIM_EQUIPMENT_ID as DIM_EQUIPMENT_ID, LTRIM(RTRIM(DM_DIM.DIM_EQUIPMENT.EQPUN_NBR)) as EQPUN_NBR, LTRIM(RTRIM(DM_DIM.DIM_EQUIPMENT.MARK_CD)) as MARK_CD FROM DM_DIM.DIM_EQUIPMENT WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE EDW_CURRENT_FLG='N' AND EDW_END_EFCTV_DT IS NULL

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT MAX(DIM_EQUIPMENT_ID) AS DIM_EQUIPMENT_ID, 1 AS DUMMY FROM DM_DIM.DIM_EQUIPMENT WHERE EDW_CURRENT_FLG='Y'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT EQPMNT_POOL_ID AS EQPMNT_POOL_ID, AAR_EQPMNT_POOL_ID AS AAR_EQPMNT_POOL_ID FROM ATM_EQPMT.EQPMNT_POOL WITH (NOLOCK)

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT ATM_EQPMT.EME_CAR_KIND_TRNSLT_PRCS.CAR_KIND_CD as CAR_KIND_CD, ATM_EQPMT.EME_CAR_KIND_TRNSLT_PRCS.START_AAR_CAR_CD as START_AAR_CAR_CD, ATM_EQPMT.EME_CAR_KIND_TRNSLT_PRCS.END_AAR_CAR_CD as END_AAR_CAR_CD FROM ATM_EQPMT.EME_CAR_KIND_TRNSLT_PRCS WITH (NOLOCK)

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT A.AAR_CAR_CD AS AAR_CAR_CD, A.OWNER_MARK_CD AS OWNER_MARK_CD, A.LESSEE_MARK_CD AS LESSEE_MARK_CD, A.PRIOR_EQPUN_NBR AS PRIOR_EQPUN_NBR, A.PRIOR_MARK_CD AS PRIOR_MARK_CD, A.STNCL_MARK_OWNER_CLASS_CD AS STNCL_MARK_OWNER_CLASS_CD, A.DLTD_TMS as DLTD_TMS A.DIM_EQUIPMENT_ID AS DIM_EQUIPMENT_ID FROM DM_DIM.DIM_EQUIPMENT A WHERE A.EDW_CURRENT_FLG='Y'

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF( IIF( SRC_REGSTRD='N', MD5_ID_TARGET_NONRGSTRD,in_MD5_ID_TARGET)=MD5_ID_SOURCE,1,IIF(IIF( SRC_REGSTRD='N', MD5_ID_TARGET_NONRGSTRD,in_MD5_ID_TARGET) != MD5_ID_SOURCE,2,0))
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: TYPE_2_FLG

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: DECODE ( TRUE, SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,1,1) = 'A' OR SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,1,1) = 'B','300', SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,1,1) = 'C' ,'311', SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,1,1) = 'E' OR SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,1,1) = 'G' OR SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,1,1) = 'J','320', (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 1, 1) = 'F') and (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 3, 1) = '0') OR (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 1, 1) = 'F') and (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 3, 1) = '1') OR (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 1, 1) = 'F') and (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 3, 1) = '2') OR (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 1, 1) = 'F') and (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 3, 1) = '3') OR (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 1, 1) = 'F') and (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 3, 1) = '6') OR (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 1, 1) = 'F') and (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 3, 1) = '7') OR (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 1, 1) = 'F') and (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 3, 1) = '9') ,'340', (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 1, 1) = 'F') and (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 3, 1) = '4') OR (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 1, 1) = 'F') and (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 3, 1) = '5') OR (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 1, 1) = 'F') and (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 3, 1) = '8'),'343', SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,1,1) = 'H' ,'310', SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,1,1) = 'K' ,'312', SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,1,1) = 'L' OR (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 1, 1) = 'M') and (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 2, 1) <> '9') OR SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,1,1) = 'R' , '380', (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 1, 1) = 'M') and (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD, 2, 1) = '9'),'360', SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,1,1) = 'P' OR SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,1,1) = 'Q' OR SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,1,1) = 'S', '342', SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,1,1) = 'T','370', SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,1,1) = 'V','341', (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,1,1) = 'D' and (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,4,4) = '0' or SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,4,4) = '1' or SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,4,4) = '2' or SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,4,4) = '3' or SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,4,4) = '4')),'101' , (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,1,1) = 'D' and (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,4,4) = '5' or SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,4,4) = '6' )),'102', (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,1,1) = 'D' and (SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,4,4) = '7' or SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,4,4) = '8' )),'103', ((SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,1,1) = 'D' and SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,4,4)='9') and (:LKP.LKP_LOCO_HP(MARK_CD,EQPUN_NBR) >=5000 and :LKP.LKP_LOCO_HP(MARK_CD,EQPUN_NBR) <=5999)),'104', SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,1,1) = 'D' and SUBSTR(AAR_CAR_CD,4,4)='9' and :LKP.LKP_LOCO_HP(MARK_CD,EQPUN_NBR) >=6000,'105' ,NULL)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: v_UCA_CDOES

GROUP.EXPRESSION: (I_U_FLG='I' or TYPE_2_FLG='2') AND ISNULL(DLTD_TMS) AND IIF(ISNULL(STATUS_CD),'X',STATUS_CD) <> 'I'
GROUP.NAME: INSERT

GROUP.DESCRIPTION: Path for the data when none of the group conditions are satisfied.
GROUP.NAME: DEFAULT1

GROUP.EXPRESSION: (I_U_FLG='U' AND TYPE_2_FLG='1' ) OR ( NOT ISNULL(DLTD_TMS) AND I_U_FLG='U' )
GROUP.NAME: UPDATE

GROUP.EXPRESSION: TYPE_2_FLG='2' AND NOT ISNULL(o_DIM_EQUIPMENT_ID) AND ISNULL(DLTD_TMS) AND IIF(ISNULL(STATUS_CD),'X',STATUS_CD) <> 'I'
GROUP.NAME: TYPE_2

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT DM_DIM.DIM_LOCOMOTIVE.HRSPWR_QTY as HRSPWR_QTY, DM_DIM.DIM_LOCOMOTIVE.MARK_CD as MARK_CD, DM_DIM.DIM_LOCOMOTIVE.EQPUN_NBR as EQPUN_NBR FROM DM_DIM.DIM_LOCOMOTIVE WITH (NOLOCK)

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT DM_DIM.DIM_EQUIPMENT.DIM_EQUIPMENT_ID as DIM_EQUIPMENT_ID, LTRIM(RTRIM(DM_DIM.DIM_EQUIPMENT.EQPUN_NBR)) as EQPUN_NBR, LTRIM(RTRIM(DM_DIM.DIM_EQUIPMENT.MARK_CD)) as MARK_CD FROM DM_DIM.DIM_EQUIPMENT WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE EDW_CURRENT_FLG='Y'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT A.AAR_CAR_CD AS AAR_CAR_CD, A.OWNER_MARK_CD AS OWNER_MARK_CD, A.LESSEE_MARK_CD AS LESSEE_MARK_CD, A.PRIOR_EQPUN_NBR AS PRIOR_EQPUN_NBR, A.PRIOR_MARK_CD AS PRIOR_MARK_CD, A.STNCL_MARK_OWNER_CLASS_CD AS STNCL_MARK_OWNER_CLASS_CD, A.DLTD_TMS as DLTD_TMS A.DIM_EQUIPMENT_ID AS DIM_EQUIPMENT_ID FROM DM_DIM.DIM_EQUIPMENT A WHERE A.EDW_CURRENT_FLG='N' and EDW_END_EFCTV_DT IS NULL

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT DIM_EQUIPMENT.DIM_EQUIPMENT_ID, DIM_EQUIPMENT.EQPUN_NBR, DIM_EQUIPMENT.MARK_CD , DIM_EQUIPMENT.STATUS_CD FROM DM_DIM.DIM_EQUIPMENT WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE EDW_CURRENT_FLG = 'Y'

SHORTCUT.COMMENTS: The MD5 function calculates the checksum of 50 input values using a cryptographic Message-Digest algorithm 5 and returns a 32 character string of hexadecimal digits (0 - F).
SHORTCUT.NAME: sc_exp_HASH50_MD5_ID

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Maximum Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Maximum Percentage of Total Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Additional Concurrent Pipelines for Lookup Cache Creation
Save session log for these runs
Session Log File Max Time Period
Post SQL
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: UPDATE DM_DIM.DIM_EQUIPMENT SET CAR_OWNERSHIP ='CP CONTROLLED' ,CP_OWNED_IND ='Y' ,EDW_UPDATE_TMS = SYSDATETIME() WHERE EDW_CURRENT_FLG ='Y' AND CONCAT(LTRIM(RTRIM(MARK_CD)),LTRIM(RTRIM(EQPUN_NBR))) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS IN(SELECT CONCAT(LTRIM(RTRIM(MARK_CD)),LTRIM(RTRIM(REPLACE(EQPUN_NBR,'CS','00')))) FROM [DM_DIM].[DIM_KCS_KCSM_EQUIPMENT])

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
